# Ariadne

> Ariadne is a local-first multilingual memory server for Codex, Claude Code, and any MCP client.

## Core facts

- Source and documentation: https://github.com/mclaut/ariadne
- Latest release: https://github.com/mclaut/ariadne/releases/latest
- License: MIT
- Platforms: Windows x64, macOS Intel and Apple Silicon, Linux x64 and ARM64
- Runtime: Go MCP server, Qdrant vector server, Ollama bge-m3 embeddings
- Retrieval: hybrid dense plus BM25 sparse search, fused with reciprocal rank fusion
- MCP tools: memory_save, memory_recall, memory_delete, memory_move
- Privacy: local endpoints by default; Qdrant binds to 127.0.0.1

## Install

Windows uses install.ps1. Linux and macOS use install.sh. Both are available in the repository root.

## Current release

v0.3.0 adds native Windows installation and updates, release archives for five targets, checksums, a CycloneDX SBOM, Sigstore verification, and an MCP Registry package.
